## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Sulaman Ahmed as a new employee at growthx.ai, covering day one activities and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sulaman to complete day one onboarding tasks in Linear/Notion, including tool setup and reading company materials](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Weekly bootcamps scheduled for next week; Sulaman to watch pre-recorded sessions and prepare questions](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Daily GitBot updates required in Slack's ops-general channel, sharing work priorities](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Bi-weekly All Hands on Fridays at 8:30 AM PT; Sulaman to introduce himself this Friday](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

## Topics

### Introductions and Role Overview

  - [Alice: Executive Assistant for operations and EPD, based in Kenya working Pacific time](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Sulaman: Software developer joining growthx.ai, based in Pakistan, flexible working hours with 4+ hours PST overlap](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

### Onboarding Process and Resources

  - [Onboarding checklist available in Notion handbook and Linear project](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Day one tasks: tool setup (Zoom, Linear, Slack, Notion), bio in team directory, bootcamp attendance](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Week one: reading company documents, watching recorded sessions, attending live bootcamps](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### Company Policies and Practices

  - [Unlimited PTO (20-30 days/year), no approval needed; calendar blocking required](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Employee referral program: $10k for engineering roles, $5k for non-engineering (after 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [4+ hours overlap with Pacific time required](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Daily GitBot updates in Slack ops-general channel](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Tools and Systems

  - [Linear for project management and issue tracking](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Slack for communication and ticket creation](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [1Password for credential management (both company and personal use)](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Okta for authentication across devices](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)

### Upcoming Events

  - [Bi-weekly All Hands on Fridays at 8:30 AM PT](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Bootcamp sessions with Marcel (Thursday) and Kyle (Friday) next week](https://fathom.video/share/qtsH_4s-poTWLstggDa77zdRyyxqELxr?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
